headline: Eversource named to TIME’s list of America’s Best Companies for 2026
summary: Prestigious national recognition highlights energy company’s commitment to customers, employees and sustainabilityHARTFORD, Conn. and BOSTON, July 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- In recognition of its continued commitment to employees, operational excellence and long-term sustainability for customers, Eversource (NYSE: ES) has been named to TIME's list of America's Best Companies for 2026, a prestigious annual ranking presented by TIME and Statista that recognizes organizations based on employee sa

headline: AI Power Demand Continues to Surge: 5 Highest Yielding Utility Stocks You Can Hold for Decades
summary: AI data centers are rewriting the rules for electricity demand, and a handful of utility stocks quietly positioned at the center of this shift carry dividend yields that income investors rarely find in quality names trading at these levels.
